title: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
description: On pages 5–8, the Orange Town conflict focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with Buggy’s occupation testing Luffy, Zoro, Nami, and the townspeople.
scene: This part follows the pressure inside Orange Town as Buggy’s crew, the Straw Hats, and the people caught between them react to the escalating fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What's this...? Looks like you are consider-ably inter-ested

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I know him, but why do you want to know?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where...? Well... If I know then I know,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And if I don't know then I could also not know anything at all...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm saying that I'm not a nice enough guy to tell you information that you want to know

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Even if it's your last wish before you die...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Then let me make you say it by force!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kuhah- Ahaha! Before you hear it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even though you are rubber, there are still some things that won't. Bounce off you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Moving here and there in the air...!

summary: The scene keeps the Orange Town arc moving by tying the immediate battle to the town’s fear, Nami’s motives, and Luffy’s instinct to answer cruelty directly.
